changes.details: Calendar popover now centered in viewport regardless of app window size, preventing it from glitching outside visible area.
Calendar now shows the ongoing week cycle (Wednesday to Tuesday) by default instead of the upcoming reset cycle.
Planned badge now appears immediately on character cards when assigning a character to a signup, without requiring a page refresh.
Clear reservation dialog now displays both local reservations and signup sheet assignments together for unified management.
All stat labels (raid/dailies/weeklies/calendar-event/gold-earner/calendar) now display in a single row as intended.
Added dispatchCalendarChanged call after assignment to ensure immediate badge update on character cards.
Improved character filtering for raid assignments using proper content_id matching from RAIDS data.
Assignments are now automatically deleted from local storage and database when loading calendar events if they have expired.
Removed Argeos Winter Event content from tasks, dashboard stats, and UI components as the event has ended.
Calendar widget integrated into dashboard stat bar for easy access to planned raids and signup sheets.
Added checkbox-based clear reservation dialog to select and remove multiple reservations at once.
Calendar now shows weekly reset view with day filtering for better navigation of upcoming raids.
Made reservations reactive with single event dispatch to reduce redundant updates and improve performance.
Created CombinedReservation type to handle both local reservations and signup assignments with proper type checking.
Added ARIA roles, labels, and keyboard support (ESC key) to dialog overlays for better accessibility compliance.

changes.description: Leader displayed twice in signup sheets
changes.details: Excluded leader status from DPS/SUP/ANY column filters to prevent duplicate display.
Changed deduplication key from userId to userId_role to prevent merging entries with different roles.
Moved sortOrder sorting before Object.values mapping for consistent raid progression display.
Added requester_discord_id field to raid_signup_sheets table for app-created signup sheets.
Automatic DM notifications when app-created signup sheets are published.
Automatic request status update to 'closed' when sheet is published from request.
Added sortOrder field (1-9) to Raid interface based on encounters.ts order for consistent raid progression display.
SQL query to add requester_discord_id field to raid_signup_sheets table.
ALTER TABLE raid_signup_sheets ADD COLUMN requester_discord_id TEXT

changes.description: Meowtator Discord bot signup sheet display
changes.details: Fixed leader displayed twice in signup sheets by excluding leader status from role column filters, and fixed raid train duplicate user display by using userId_role deduplication key instead of just userId.
Added requester Discord ID tracking for signup sheets created from the app, with automatic DM notifications when sheets are published and automatic request status updates to 'closed'.

Replaced item level-based sorting with explicit sortOrder field for consistent raid progression display across Settings/Tracking, Settings/Raids, ToDo, and Dashboard. Cathedral now correctly appears as the newest raid at the bottom.
